idea-plugin.name: Apache Doris Driver Integration
idea-plugin.description:
First-class Apache Doris data source support for DataGrip and IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate.

Provides a ready-to-use Apache Doris driver template with built-in JDBC artifact download, connection validation, and Doris SQL dialect support.

  • Apache Doris data source entry in the Data Sources and Drivers dialog
  • Preconfigured JDBC URL template with default port 9030
  • Connection validation with Doris-specific port and URL checks
  • Doris SQL dialect with 565 keyword highlighting
  • Definition provider for tables, views, and databases (SHOW CREATE)
  • MySQL fallback for standard SQL syntax support

Apache Doris is a high-performance real-time analytical database based on MPP architecture. This plugin is intended for Doris users who want a native setup experience inside JetBrains database IDEs.

Keywords: Apache Doris OLAP analytical database SQL JDBC MySQL-compatible
